calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-20-2023 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-24-2023 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-13-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated May-30-2019 is admitted to probate. Nicole Bement Lindstrom is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $190,000. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Jul-10-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-08-2022 Continued To Jun-13-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
